user.title: Home Connect AC
user.description: Run the **HomeConnect AC Auth** macOS app to sign in, then click **Copy** in that app and paste the result below.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Home Connect AC
reauth_confirm.description: Your session expired. Run the **HomeConnect AC Auth** macOS app again, click **Copy**, and paste the result below.

error.invalid_code: Couldn't read those credentials. Copy the full value from the auth app and try again.
error.invalid_auth: These credentials were rejected. Re-run the auth app to get a fresh sign-in.
